data.revised_prompt:
Create one clean HD 2D game sprite animation sheet on a flat solid magenta chroma-key background (#FF00FF), exactly 2 rows by 2 columns, with 4 equal invisible cells and no visible grid lines or borders. Read left-to-right across rows. Each cell contains the same character at the same scale and centered, full body visible, three-quarter RPG view from slightly above, stable feet/bottom anchor line, subject fills about 58–66% of each cell with generous magenta margin. Subject: cute Q-version ranged enemy for Samsara Ascension, a chibi corrupted xianxia spell archer with a big head, small body, dark teal robe, tiny bow or talisman focus held close, sly hostile expression, rounded readable silhouette, clean HD hand-painted chibi fantasy RPG sprite, not photorealistic, not 3D, not pixel art. Preserve exact identity, palette, facial core, costume marks, weapon/focus, and material language across all frames. Combat animation frames with real pose changes only; keep effects compact and tightly attached, no detached projectiles, no wide arcs, no long trails, no dust clouds, no impact bursts.

Frame layout and action:
- Top-left: attack wind-up / casting wind-up; body crouches or coils; weapon/focus/energy pulled close.
- Top-right: compact strike / shot release / magic pulse; body lunges or snaps forward; all effects remain tight.
- Bottom-left: follow-through with clear recoil; cloth/hair/flame momentum; no large detached effect.
- Bottom-right: guard or recovery pose, ready to loop back into combat.

Style: clean HD hand-painted chibi fantasy RPG sprite, crisp readable silhouette, soft shading, subtle painted highlights, dark teal robe with corrupted xianxia accents, cute but hostile, animation-frame consistency, no perspective drift. Entire subject and any bow, talisman, horn, petal, hair, sleeve, tail, or tiny attached aura must fit fully inside each cell. No text, labels, numbers, arrows, UI, watermark, visible grid, extra characters, cropped body parts, inconsistent scale, redesigns, alternate forms, gradients, texture, floor, shadow, photorealism, 3D render, or pixel art.
